task_completion.description: Weasis is open and displaying a DICOM image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis application window is visible with a medical image (e.g., X-ray) loaded in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: The Cobb Angle tool is selected in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Cobb Angle tool icon is highlighted in the Weasis toolbar or visible in a selected tool menu.

task_completion.description: A Cobb angle measurement is drawn on the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two lines are drawn on the medical image with an angle measurement (in degrees) displayed between or near them, characteristic of a Cobb angle annotation in Weasis.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the measurement is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., scrot, import), Weasis export dialog, or file manager showing the image being saved to '~/DICOM/exports/cobb_angle_result.png'.

task_completion.description: A text file containing the tool name is created at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., echo 'Cobb Angle' > ...) or text editor showing the creation of '~/DICOM/exports/measurement_type.txt' with content including the word 'cobb' or 'Cobb Angle'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis GUI to perform the measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines and angle text appear as native Weasis annotations within the Weasis interface, not drawn using an external image editor like GIMP.

integrity.description: The agent actively created the screenshot and text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen executing commands or using GUI dialogs to create the screenshot and text file, rather than copying pre-existing files or using a script provided outside the task scope.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected image path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/cobb_angle_result.png'. The expected text path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/measurement_type.txt'. The text file must contain the keyword 'cobb' (case-insensitive).
